develop.description: Design a new workflow from requirements

preflight.description: Run parallel readiness checks before shipping

hotfix.description: Fast-track a hotfix with reduced scope

evolve-workflow.description: Audit and evolve a workflow repository

iterate-workflow.description: Iterate a workflow from lessons with approval

review.description: Run parallel multi-agent review on current changes

test.description: Run validation or tests related to current changes

doc.description: Update documentation for changed workflow assets

workflow-audit.description: Audit workflow structure patterns and quality

validate-file.description: Validate workflow file format and constraints

workflowprogram-orchestrate.description: Natural-language router for current-project workflow requests; 为当前项目设计、审计、迭代、验证 workflow 时优先使用此入口

workflowprogram-develop.description: Design or update workflow assets for the current target project

workflowprogram-audit.description: Audit workflow assets in the current target project

workflowprogram-iterate.description: Generate workflow improvement proposals from lessons and current state

workflowprogram-validate.description: Validate workflow assets in the current target project at workflow scope

workflowprogram-release.description: Release WorkflowProgram plugin changes by bumping plugin metadata, rebuilding dist, validating, committing, and pushing
